cases.input: We have coding conventions scattered across CONTRIBUTING.md, a wiki, and some PDFs — can you compile them into one scope-aware guidelines doc for the team?
cases.notes: Canonical trigger: compiling scattered guideline sources into one scope-aware doc.

cases.input: Before ult-context-generate builds its constraints layer, merge our scattered project guidelines from docs, PDFs, and tribal knowledge into a single conflict-resolved COMPILED-GUIDELINES.md.
cases.notes: Emphasizes the ult-context-generate Constraints-layer consumer, distinct phrasing from case 01.

cases.input: Can you add a pre-commit hook that blocks commits violating our style guide automatically?
cases.notes: Runtime rule enforcement — exactly the case the skill's 'Do NOT use to enforce rules at runtime' clause exists to redirect away from guideline compilation.
